purpose: Reflect the PR-169 promotion gate result as a scoped B+ rank update for the verified JRA snapshot scope only. This overlay does not claim full-month coverage, June 2026 coverage, or A-rank status.

rank_update.basis: Each scoped meeting has source-verified race rows and derived first_race_time, last_race_time, and race_count from official JRA calendar pages.

display_guidance.scope_note: Verified selected JRA snapshot only; not full-month coverage.
display_guidance.time_display: Use per-meeting first_race_time and last_race_time from the verified snapshot.
display_guidance.race_count_display: Use per-meeting race_count from the verified snapshot.
display_guidance.details_display: Do not expose A-rank racecard detail UI from this update.

forward_schedule.goal: Validate that the scoped B+ label, time fields, race counts, source links, and scope note render without implying full-month or A-rank coverage.

forward_schedule.condition: Use only if more official JRA calendar pages are verified.
forward_schedule.goal: Expand the verified snapshot scope without changing the A-rank boundary.

forward_schedule.condition: Use if JRA expansion is paused.
